title: Patent not to issue until purchase price is paid
doc_html:
§804.  Patent not to issue until purchase price is paid

The register shall not issue a patent to the purchaser of the land until he has paid into the hands of the state treasurer the purchase price of the lands.
doc_text:
§804.  Patent not to issue until purchase price is paid
The register shall not issue a patent to the purchaser of the land until he has paid into the hands of the state treasurer the purchase price of the lands.
